title: bridelia retusa
intro: Bridelia retusa, also known as the "Gutty" or "Ipeca", is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bridelia retusa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various health issues such as malaria, diarrhea, and respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, as well as being used in the form of tinctures and ointments.
